form.formComment: Resumes off a 32 day letup. Last outing to post a big 7 len win. Plumpton on March 9 over 4100m defeating Five Bar Gate with 73kg at $1.80 in a hurdle. Start before finished third in a small field at Ascot on February 14 over 3900m, 10 len behind Mondoui'boy carrying 73kg at $6.50. Improved sharply to score a highly impressive win by 7 lengths in a hurdle (4100m) at Plumpton more recently. More needed in a better race.

form.formComment: Racing well. Resumes off a 55 day letup. Last outing to post a big 4 len win. Haydock Park in a G2 Prestige Novices' Hurdle on February 14 over 4900m defeating Ubatuba with 71kg at $3.50 in a jumps. Run before favourite; won by 1.3 len Haydock Park on January 17 over 4860m defeating Stay Away Fay carrying 69.5kg at $3.50 in a hurdle. Promising galloper. More needed but he is progressing.

form.formComment: Resumes after two months. Finished off last campaign 5 of 8 runners at Leopardstown in the G1 Golden Cygnet Novice Hurdle February 2 over 4425m, on rain affected going; 26 len behind Doctor Steinberg carrying 74.5kg at $19. Previous preparation first-up won by 2.5 len Galway July 31 over 3621m defeating Hawk's Rock with 76kg at $8.50. Cheekpieces added but hard to fancy.

form.formComment: Resumes off a 49 day letup. Last outing favourite; raced just off the speed and boxed on; won by 8 len Ffos Las on February 20 over 4000m on heavy going defeating Rathkenny with 75kg at $2 in a hurdle. Race before favourite; won by 2.25 len Taunton on January 17 over 3800m defeating Kilwaughter carrying 72.5kg at $2.10 in a hurdle. In good form but others rate better.

form.formComment: On a three run winning streak. Last run won by 1.5 len Cheltenham in a G1 Spa Novices Hurdle on March 13 over 4800m slow track defeating Fruit De Mer carrying 73kg at $21 in a jumps. Race before raced just off the speed and boxed to post a big 7 len win. Carlisle on February 16 over 3400m slow track defeating Kilnesare Flight carrying 73kg at $1.60 in a hurdle. Fancied to repeat Cheltenham result.

form.formComment: Last run finished sixth of 22 runners at Cheltenham in the G1 Spa Novices Hurdle on March 13 over 4800m, on slow going 13 len behind Johnny's Jury with 73kg at $23. Run before ran on from midfield and won by a nose Cheltenham in a G2 Classic Novices' Hurdle on January 24 over 4100m slow track defeating Taurus Bay with 72kg at $15 in a jumps. Continues to make headway. No surprise to see him back in form.

form.formComment: Racing second-up today. First-up after three months pulled up at Cheltenham in the G1 Baring Bingham Novices' Hurdle on March 11 over 4200m. Previously second-up favourite; came from midfield to post a big 5 len win. Sandown Park in a G2 Winter Novices' Hurdle on December 5 over 4000m slow going defeating The Blue Room with 73kg at $1.40 in a jumps. Big chance if bouncing back.

form.formComment: Impressive in recent runs. Resumes off a 30 day letup. Last outing finished third of 21 starters at Cheltenham in the G1 Baring Bingham Novices' Hurdle on March 11 over 4200m, 3.5 len behind King Rasko Grey with 73kg at $51. The run before won by 0.8 len Navan on January 17 over 3218m defeating Lazare De Star with 73.5kg at $7 in a novice hurdle. Continues to improve. Live contender again.

form.formComment: Freshened for 62 days. Last start pulled up at Warwick in the G2 Jane Seymour Mares' Novices' Hurdle on February 7 over 3800m. The run before favourite; ran on strong from last on the turn and won by 8 len Cork in a G3 Cork Stayers Novice Hurdle on December 7 over 4928m defeating Quantum Quest carrying 66.5kg at $4.50 in a jumps. Unlikely to threaten.
